tasks.title: Create Simulator Project Structure and Core Components
tasks.description: Establish the Simulator project with proper directory structure, build system, command-line interface, and core simulation orchestration logic.
tasks.details: Create the Simulator/ directory with proper makefile for building the main executable. Implement command-line argument parsing for both comparative and competitive modes with proper validation and error handling. Design the core Simulator class that can orchestrate multiple game instances, manage dynamic library loading (.so files), and coordinate threading. Implement file discovery utilities for finding game managers, algorithms, and maps in specified directories. Set up the foundation for result collection and output file generation with timestamped naming. Ensure the executable follows the naming convention simulator_<submitter_ids>.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify command-line parsing works correctly for both modes with all required and optional arguments. Test error handling for missing arguments, invalid file paths, and non-existent directories. Confirm the simulator executable builds successfully and has the correct naming convention. Test file discovery functions with sample directories. Validate that the basic simulator structure can be instantiated and initialized without crashes.

tasks.title: Refactor Input Validation from GameManager to Simulator
tasks.description: Move input validation and error handling logic from GameManager to Simulator to centralize error handling and improve separation of concerns.
tasks.details: Extract all input validation logic currently in GameManager that handles command-line arguments, file path validation, and parameter checking. Move this logic to the Simulator class where it belongs according to the new architecture. This includes: validating game map files exist and are readable, checking that algorithm .so files are valid and loadable, verifying GameManager .so files are accessible, validating numeric parameters (num_threads, max_steps, num_shells), and ensuring directory paths are valid and contain expected files. Update GameManager to focus solely on game execution logic, removing any command-line or file system validation. Implement proper error propagation from Simulator to provide meaningful error messages to users. Ensure all validation happens before any dynamic library loading or game execution begins.
tasks.testStrategy: Test that invalid file paths are caught by Simulator before GameManager execution. Verify that malformed .so files are detected at Simulator level. Confirm that GameManager no longer performs input validation and focuses only on game logic. Test error messages are clear and helpful when validation fails. Ensure that valid inputs still work correctly after the refactoring.

tasks.title: Conditional Verbose Output in GameManager
tasks.description: Modify GameManager to only generate output files when verbose parameter is true, eliminating all file output for normal simulator operation.
tasks.details: Remove all file output generation logic from GameManager run() method when verbose=false. The AbstractGameManager interface includes a verbose parameter that should control whether output files are created. When verbose=true, maintain existing file output behavior for debugging/analysis purposes. When verbose=false (normal simulator operation), skip all file I/O operations including board state files, game progression logs, and final result files. Update constructor to accept verbose parameter and store as member variable. Modify all output-generating methods to check verbose flag before writing files. Ensure file output paths and naming conventions match assignment 2 requirements when verbose=true. Remove any hardcoded file output that doesn't respect the verbose flag. Update error handling to not create error log files when verbose=false.
tasks.testStrategy: Test GameManager with verbose=true to verify existing file output behavior is preserved. Test with verbose=false to confirm no files are created during game execution. Verify file system is not accessed when verbose=false using filesystem monitoring tools. Test both successful games and error scenarios with verbose=false to ensure no file output occurs. Validate that verbose parameter is properly passed through constructor and stored. Test edge cases like file permission errors when verbose=true vs verbose=false behavior.

tasks.title: Validation and Integration Testing
tasks.description: Comprehensive testing of refactored GameManager with various inputs and integration scenarios for Simulator compatibility
tasks.details: Create comprehensive test suite covering SatelliteView parsing, factory integration, and GameResult generation. Test with various board sizes and configurations. Validate performance meets simulation requirements (target <100ms per game for threading). Test thread-safety if GameManager will be used concurrently. Create integration tests simulating Simulator usage patterns. Test edge cases: empty boards, single-tank scenarios, maximum tank configurations. Verify memory management and cleanup. Performance profiling to identify bottlenecks. Load testing with rapid successive game execution.
tasks.testStrategy: Execute comprehensive test suite covering all refactored functionality. Performance benchmarking with target <100ms per game execution. Memory leak detection using valgrind or similar tools. Thread safety testing with concurrent game execution. Integration testing with mock Simulator scenarios. Stress testing with various board configurations and algorithm combinations.

tasks.title: Add namespace UserCommon_098765432_123456789 to UserCommon bonus features
tasks.description: Wrap all classes and functions in 49 remaining UserCommon bonus feature files with the unique namespace UserCommon_098765432_123456789 to comply with assignment requirements.
tasks.details: Add namespace UserCommon_098765432_123456789 wrapper to all remaining 49 files in UserCommon bonus directories: bonus/logger (logging utilities, file handlers, log formatters), bonus/cli (command line parsing, argument validation, help text generation), bonus/visualization (game state rendering, ASCII art generation, color output), bonus/analysis (game statistics, performance metrics, result analysis), and bonus/board_generator (procedural map generation, validation algorithms). Update all header files with namespace opening/closing braces. Update all source files to include namespace wrapper. Update all internal references between bonus modules to use fully qualified names or appropriate using declarations. Ensure no naming conflicts with standard library or other project namespaces. Update any forward declarations to include namespace qualification. Verify all template specializations work correctly within namespace. Test compilation of all bonus feature combinations.
tasks.testStrategy: Compile each bonus directory independently to verify namespace compliance. Test inter-module dependencies within bonus features work correctly. Verify no naming conflicts or ambiguous references. Test that bonus features can be optionally included/excluded during build. Run existing bonus feature test suites to ensure functionality unchanged. Check that namespace-qualified names resolve correctly in all usage contexts. Verify template instantiations and specializations work within namespace.

tasks.title: Update Algorithm directory to use UserCommon namespace
tasks.description: Add 'using namespace UserCommon_098765432_123456789;' statements to all Algorithm files that reference UserCommon classes to establish proper namespace usage after UserCommon refactoring.
tasks.details: Add 'using namespace UserCommon_098765432_123456789;' declaration at the top of each Algorithm source file (.cpp and .h files) that references UserCommon classes. This includes files that use game board utilities, object classes (Tank, Shell, GameObject), utility classes (Point, Direction, Midpoint), and SatelliteView implementations. Place the using statement after include directives but before any Algorithm namespace declarations. Update any explicit UserCommon:: qualifications to rely on the using statement instead. Verify all Algorithm files compile correctly with the namespace usage. Test that Algorithm classes can properly instantiate and use UserCommon objects without namespace conflicts. Ensure the using statement doesn't interfere with Algorithm's own namespace wrapper Algorithm_098765432_123456789.
tasks.testStrategy: Compile each Algorithm file individually to verify namespace resolution works correctly. Test Algorithm functionality that depends on UserCommon classes (game board access, object manipulation, utility functions). Verify no ambiguous symbol resolution or naming conflicts occur. Test Algorithm registration and factory creation still works with namespace changes. Build Algorithm shared library (.so) and verify it loads correctly. Run basic algorithm tests to ensure UserCommon integration remains functional.

tasks.title: Add registration declaration for Algorithm factories
tasks.description: Add proper registration declarations to Algorithm factory classes to ensure they are correctly registered with the factory system for runtime instantiation.
tasks.details: Add registration declarations to all Algorithm factory classes (basic_player_factory, basic_tank_algorithm_factory, and any other factory implementations) to ensure they are properly registered with the central factory registry system. This typically involves adding static registration calls or registration macros at the file level that will execute during program initialization. Update factory header files to include necessary registration declarations. Ensure registration happens before main() execution through static initialization or explicit registration calls. Verify factory classes follow the proper inheritance hierarchy and implement required interface methods. Update any factory manager or registry classes to properly handle Algorithm factory registrations. Consider thread-safety if factories will be accessed concurrently during simulation.
tasks.testStrategy: Compile Algorithm factories and verify registration occurs during program startup. Test factory instantiation through registry lookup to confirm proper registration. Verify factory classes can be discovered and instantiated by name or type. Test multiple factory registrations work without conflicts. Create unit tests that verify factory registration state before and after initialization. Test factory cleanup and deregistration if supported. Verify integration with existing GameManager factory usage patterns.

tasks.title: Create Root CMakeLists.txt with Global Configuration
tasks.description: Establish the root build system with global C++17 configuration, compiler flags, and build options
tasks.details: Create root CMakeLists.txt with minimum CMake version 3.14+, set C++17 standard, configure compiler flags (-Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic -fPIC), define build options (ENABLE_TESTING=ON, ENABLE_VISUALIZATION=OFF), set CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY to build/, and establish project structure foundation
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CMake configuration generates without errors, confirm C++17 standard is set, validate compiler flags are applied, and ensure build options are correctly defined

tasks.title: Implement Google Test Dependency Management
tasks.description: Configure FetchContent to download and setup Google Test framework for all projects
tasks.details: Use FetchContent_Declare and FetchContent_MakeAvailable to download Google Test to third_party/googletest/, configure gtest and gtest_main libraries, set proper include directories, and make available to all subdirectories with find_package integration
tasks.testStrategy: Verify Google Test is downloaded to correct location, confirm gtest libraries are available, validate include paths are set correctly, and test basic gtest compilation

tasks.title: Create UserCommon Source Collection System
tasks.description: Implement recursive collection of UserCommon source and header files for sharing across projects
tasks.details: Use file(GLOB_RECURSE) to collect all UserCommon/*.cpp files into USERCOMMON_SOURCES variable, collect all UserCommon/*.h files into USERCOMMON_HEADERS variable, handle conditional compilation for visualization features based on ENABLE_VISUALIZATION, and propagate variables to subdirectories using PARENT_SCOPE
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all UserCommon source files are collected correctly, confirm variables are available in subdirectories, validate conditional compilation excludes visualization when disabled, and test file collection updates when new files are added

tasks.title: Setup Directory Structure and Output Paths
tasks.description: Configure proper directory structure with build/, third_party/, and project-specific output locations
tasks.details: Create build/ directory structure with subdirectories for each project, configure CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY and CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY, set up proper paths for test executables in build/ProjectName/, and ensure shared libraries output to project directories
tasks.testStrategy: Verify directory structure is created correctly, confirm output paths direct to proper locations, validate build artifacts are placed in correct directories, and test both debug and release configurations

tasks.title: Create GameManager CMakeLists.txt Foundation
tasks.description: Establish GameManager project build system with proper library configuration and dependencies
tasks.details: Create GameManager/CMakeLists.txt with project definition, configure shared library target GameManager_098765432_123456789, set proper include directories (GameManager/, Common/, UserCommon/), configure shared library properties (SONAME, symbol visibility), and establish dependency on parent-provided variables
tasks.testStrategy: Verify GameManager CMakeLists.txt parses correctly, confirm library target is properly configured, validate include directories are set correctly, and test shared library properties are applied

tasks.title: Implement GameManager Source File Integration
tasks.description: Configure GameManager library to compile all GameManager source files and integrate UserCommon sources
tasks.details: Use file(GLOB) to collect all GameManager/*.cpp files, integrate USERCOMMON_SOURCES from parent scope into library target, handle conditional compilation for visualization features, configure proper source file dependencies, and ensure namespace preservation for UserCommon code
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all GameManager source files are included in build, confirm UserCommon sources are compiled into library, validate conditional compilation works correctly, and test library contains expected symbols

tasks.title: Configure GameManager Shared Library Properties
tasks.description: Set proper shared library properties including symbol visibility, naming, and output location
tasks.details: Set library OUTPUT_NAME to GameManager_098765432_123456789, configure LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY to GameManager/, set symbol visibility to hidden by default with explicit exports, configure SONAME property, and ensure position-independent code compilation
tasks.testStrategy: Verify shared library is created with correct name and location, confirm symbol visibility is properly configured, validate SONAME is set correctly, and test library can be loaded dynamically

tasks.title: Implement GameManager Test Configuration
tasks.description: Create test executable configuration with proper dependencies and Google Test integration
tasks.details: Create GameManager_tests executable target, collect all GameManager/test/*.cpp files, link against GameManager library and Google Test libraries, set output directory to build/GameManager/, configure proper include paths for test files, and ensure test executable has access to all required headers
tasks.testStrategy: Verify test executable compiles successfully, confirm linking with GameManager library and Google Test, validate test executable can run basic tests, and ensure all test files are included

tasks.title: Setup CTest Integration and Test Discovery
tasks.description: Configure CTest for test discovery and execution across all projects
tasks.details: Enable CTest with enable_testing(), add GameManager tests using add_test(), configure test discovery for Google Test, set proper test working directories, configure test timeout and parallel execution, and ensure tests can be run individually or collectively
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CTest discovers all tests correctly, confirm tests can be run with ctest command, validate individual test execution works, and test parallel test execution

tasks.title: Create Root-Level Convenience Targets
tasks.description: Implement high-level build targets for coordinated project building and testing
tasks.details: Create all_projects custom target that depends on all project libraries, implement all_tests target for building all test executables, create run_all_tests target that builds and executes all tests, configure proper target dependencies and execution order
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all_projects target builds all libraries correctly, confirm all_tests target builds all test executables, validate run_all_tests executes all tests and reports results, and test target dependencies work correctly

tasks.title: Configure Include Path Management
tasks.description: Establish proper include path strategy for cross-project dependencies and header access
tasks.details: Configure target_include_directories for public/private include paths, set up Common/ and UserCommon/ as public includes, configure project-specific includes as private, establish include path conventions for different file types, and ensure proper header accessibility across projects
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all required headers can be included correctly, confirm include path precedence works as expected, validate both public and private includes function properly, and test cross-project header access

tasks.title: Implement Conditional Compilation for Visualization
tasks.description: Configure conditional compilation system for visualization features based on ENABLE_VISUALIZATION option
tasks.details: Implement conditional source file inclusion for visualization code, configure preprocessor definitions based on ENABLE_VISUALIZATION option, handle optional dependencies for visualization libraries, exclude visualization sources when disabled, and ensure clean compilation in both modes
tasks.testStrategy: Verify compilation succeeds with ENABLE_VISUALIZATION=ON and OFF, confirm visualization sources are properly included/excluded, validate preprocessor definitions are set correctly, and test functionality in both modes

tasks.title: Configure Parallel Build Support
tasks.description: Ensure build system supports parallel compilation and proper dependency management
tasks.details: Configure proper target dependencies to prevent race conditions, ensure thread-safe build operations, optimize dependency chains for parallel execution, configure proper linking order, and validate parallel build stability with make -j
tasks.testStrategy: Verify parallel builds complete without race conditions, confirm dependency resolution works correctly in parallel, validate build reproducibility across multiple runs, and test various parallel job counts

tasks.title: Implement Clean Build and Artifact Management
tasks.description: Configure proper clean targets and build artifact management
tasks.details: Configure clean target to remove all build artifacts while preserving downloaded dependencies, implement proper artifact separation between intermediate and final outputs, ensure clean builds work correctly, configure proper file permissions and cleanup, and validate incremental build behavior
tasks.testStrategy: Verify clean target removes all build artifacts correctly, confirm downloaded dependencies are preserved, validate clean builds reproduce identical results, and test incremental build optimization

tasks.title: Validate Complete Build System Integration
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive validation of the entire build system with all success criteria
tasks.details: Execute full build validation including library creation, symbol verification, test compilation and execution, dependency checking with ldd, performance validation, and comprehensive testing of all build targets and options. Document all verification commands and expected outputs
tasks.testStrategy: Run complete test suite including: make gamemanager creates .so file, ldd shows no external dependencies, make gamemanager_tests creates and runs tests, make run_all_tests executes successfully, parallel builds work correctly, and all success criteria from PRD are met
